title: Build Your First AI Chatbot
description: Create your very first web application - an AI-powered chatbot using Python Flask, Bootstrap, and ChatterBot in GitHub Codespaces. No prior web development experience required!
learning_outcomes: Create and configure a GitHub repository with proper naming conventions
Write commit messages following the TempeHS style guide
Write a README.md file documenting your project
Understand and apply the GNU GPL open source license
Set up a Python Flask web application in GitHub Codespaces
Build a functional chatbot backend using ChatterBot
Create an attractive frontend using Bootstrap
Identify privacy and ethical concerns with AI chatbots
Implement basic safety measures in AI applications
Conduct User Acceptance Testing with formal test cases
